The '''''Spiral''''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that operated as a [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] fought by the Alliance against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Operated by a veteran crew with communications expert [[Del Goren/Legends|Del Goren]] a former member by [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], the ''Spiral'' ambushed multiple Imperial convoys, and the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] was notorious for arriving at its destination when it was least expected.

==Description==
A [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] vessel,<ref name="Rebel Tech" /> the ''Spiral'' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]<ref name="Spiral" /> affiliated with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="Rebel Tech" /> The [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]]-equipped [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was manufactured by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]].<ref name="Spiral" /> The ''Spiral''{{'s}} spoked forward [[Viewport/Legends|viewport]] differed from those found on other CR90 corvettes.<ref name="Viewport">The image used to depict the ''Spiral'' is actually that of a concept model for the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']], with the latter [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette's]] appearance in the [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] film ultimately having a narrow horizontal [[Viewport/Legends|viewport]]. The depiction of the ''Spiral'' as a CR90 [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] with a "spoked" viewport [[in-universe]] differs from the appearance of the ''Tantive IV'' and other official depictions of CR90 corvettes; another example of one with a horizontal viewport can be seen [[:File:Corvette_negvv.png|here]], in an image from the ''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''.</ref>

==History==
Operational in the [[Time/Legends|time]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the ''Spiral'' was a Rebel Alliance privateer vessel which was in service during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a conflict that was fought between the Alliance and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Rebel Tech" /> In the course of its service, the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] launched several successful ambushes on [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] convoys. The ''Spiral'' established a name for itself by repeatedly reaching its destination when least expected.<ref name="Spiral" />

==Commanders and crew==
The ''Spiral'' was operated by a veteran crew.<ref name="Spiral" /> One of the individuals who served aboard the privateer corvette was the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Del Goren/Legends|Del Goren]], a communications expert also skilled in [[scanner]] [[Jammer/Legends|jamming]]. Goren later joined the [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Alliance High Command]].<ref name="Rebel Tech" /> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'' Episode IV: ''A New Hope'']], including [[Del Goren/Legends|Del Goren's]] appearance, to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref> Goren served at the High Command's headquarters, [[Great Temple/Legends|Massassi Station]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], during the Battle of Yavin.<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Spiral'' was first mentioned on the "Rebel Tech" card in the ''[[A New Hope Limited]]'' expansion pack of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="Rebel Tech" /> The privateer corvette later received its own dedicated card in the ''[[Special Edition Limited]]'' expansion pack, which was its first visual depiction.<ref name="Spiral" /> The image used to depict the ''Spiral'' is actually that of a concept model for the CR90 corvette [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']]; the "spoked window" viewport was later replaced by a thin horizontal viewport on the final design.<ref name="BTM">''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]''</ref><ref name="Sculpting">''[[Sculpting a Galaxy: Inside the Star Wars Model Shop]]''</ref>
